intended_use: Prepare governed, provenance-preserving analytics packages and cohort feasibility inputs for research or operations analytics teams after human approval.
prohibited_uses: Clinical decision support or patient-care recommendation workflows.
Diagnosis, treatment, triage, or patient-specific clinical advice.
Replacing IRB, privacy, data-use, or clinical governance review.
Searching or exporting raw PHI without approval.
workflow_steps: Ingest source data or external documents as candidate artifacts.
Classify PHI/sensitivity and preserve source provenance.
Map supported clinical resources into OMOP preview target tables.
Generate vocabulary candidates and unresolved concept warnings.
Run human review for sensitive fields, semantic mappings, and export intent.
Export an ETL manifest for analytics teams or a downstream OMOP staging job.
Run downstream OHDSI DQD before using outputs for research analytics.
required_approvals: data steward approval for semantic mappings
privacy approval for PHI-bearing source artifacts
analytics owner approval before downstream ETL
IRB or data-use approval where required by the organization
separation_controls: Research workflow language must not claim clinical decision support.
Assistant answers must label cohort outputs as analytics preparation only.
ClinicalPackage review gates remain separate from OMOP export approval.
External search results remain candidate sources until ingestion approval.
warnings: Cohort and analytics workflow outputs are not validated for patient care.
OMOP preview packages need vocabulary and DQD validation before research use.
